home.title: Hi, I'm Jeremy.
home.subtitle: A CTO and AI builder working on the seam between distributed systems and human cognition. I write, ship, and occasionally publish essays from my workshop.

about.title: About
about.label: COGNITIVE ARCHITECT
about.heading: Designing systems that think alongside humans.
about.bio1: Jeremy Nguyen is a systems engineer turned digital curator. His work explores the delicate boundary between computational efficiency and the messy, beautiful reality of human cognition. Based at the intersection of engineering and editorial design.
about.bio2: For the past decade, I've focused on building "Cognitive Artifacts" — tools that don't just solve problems, but expand the user's capacity for thought. My approach treats code as a medium for curation.
about.philosophyQuote: Every line of code is a stroke in a larger portrait of human progress.

timeline.title: CTO & Founder
timeline.desc: Building AI-native products and consulting on system architecture.

timeline.title: Principal Engineer
timeline.desc: Led platform migration to event-driven microservices at scale.

timeline.title: Engineering Lead
timeline.desc: Built and grew a 20-person engineering team from scratch.

timeline.title: Senior Developer
timeline.desc: Full-stack development with focus on real-time data systems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Whether you want to collaborate, discuss an idea, or just say hello — my inbox is open.

step1.message: Hello. I'm Jeremy. I'm excited to hear about what you're building. To get started,

step2.message: Nice to meet you. What email address should I use to follow up with you?

step3.message: Finally, what would you like to talk about? Feel free to be as detailed as you like about your initiative.

conversation.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
conversation.errorMessage: Failed to send. Please try again.

chat.greeting: Hi, how can I help you?
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.offline: I'm offline right now. Leave a message and I'll get back to you.
